steps.description: Connectors for Binance, Bybit, and Bitunix import balances, positions, trades, transfers, funding, and PnL
steps.notes: ExchangeConnector trait + three implementations; run_post_sync upserts all entities; migration 007; GET-only audit + signing tests. Operator prerequisite: read-only keys + Sync exchanges now

steps.description: Portfolio Engine calculates realized gains, unrealized gains, and total return
steps.notes: compute_hybrid_pnl PnlBreakdown; total_return_pct; unit tests avg_cost_fallback_unrealized, avg_cost_from_buys; REST /portfolio/pnl and wealth PnL row

steps.description: Crypto holdings included in net worth view (extends US-0005)
steps.notes: Migration 007 crypto_value_eur/firefly_value_eur columns; WealthService compute_extended; /wealth Overview + Crypto tab. Operator prerequisite: PostgreSQL + exchange sync for live combined total

steps.description: Portfolio allocation scenarios supported (e.g. 50% ETF / 50% crypto)
steps.notes: allocation_target plan enum + 50/50 template; allocation_gap in wealth service; PlanningPage + WealthPage gap card. Operator prerequisite: active allocation_target plan + synced wealth

steps.description: Grafana Dashboard 4 shows crypto slice and portfolio performance
steps.notes: portfolio.json uid=portfolio: crypto_value_eur stat, Firefly vs crypto pie, total_return_pct series, FX incomplete panel. Operator smoke: post-sync snapshot

steps.description: API keys stored in self-hosted secrets/config, not transmitted externally
steps.notes: TOML env var names only; std::env::var credentials; Settings no secret values; exchange_api_responses_contain_no_secrets test path; .env.example; read-only design
